body:
## Unblock the Repository Hardening workflow

Two checks in `repository-hardening.yml` fail on **every** PR in this org (e.g. #622) without providing any security value. This PR fixes both. No application code is touched.

### 1. Trivy filesystem scan
`aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0` was removed upstream — the run fails immediately with `Unable to resolve action aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0, unable to find version 0.24.0`. Bumped to `@master`, consistent with how `docker-build.yml` already references this action. (Recommend re-pinning to a verified immutable tag in a follow-up once one is confirmed.)

### 2. Gitleaks secret scan
`gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2` requires a license key for GitHub organizations: `[Dealix-sa] is an organization. License key is required… missing gitleaks license`. Without the secret it errors **before scanning**, so it blocks PRs while scanning nothing. This PR:
- wires `GITLEAKS_LICENSE: ${{ secrets.GITLEAKS_LICENSE }}` so the step works the instant the org secret is added, and
- marks the step `continue-on-error: true` so it stops blocking until then.

**Action for the maintainer:** add a `GITLEAKS_LICENSE` org/repo secret (grab one at gitleaks.io), then remove the `continue-on-error: true` line to make Gitleaks enforcing again.

### Scope
- Touches only `.github/workflows/repository-hardening.yml`.
- YAML validated locally.
- Kept separate from the feature work in #622 by request.

https://claude.ai/code/session_016NKnrMJ2jS3NVt9GB83t5b

---

commits.messageBody:
…nse)

Two pre-existing failures in the Repository Hardening workflow block every
PR without adding any security value:

- Trivy: aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0 was removed upstream and no longer
  resolves ("unable to find version 0.24.0"). Track @master (consistent with
  docker-build.yml) so the pin can't go stale; re-pin to a verified immutable
  tag later.
- Gitleaks: gitleaks-action@v2 requires a license key for GitHub orgs. Without
  the GITLEAKS_LICENSE secret it errors before scanning. Make the step
  non-blocking and wire the secret so it auto-enforces once the org secret is
  added (just remove continue-on-error then).

No application code touched.
commits.messageHeadline: ci(security): unblock repository-hardening (Trivy pin + Gitleaks lice…

title: ci(security): unblock repository-hardening (Trivy pin + Gitleaks license)
